title: Boston Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Boston with a Z-Score of +3.11. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, scoring 10.0/10 in severity.
body:
The current heat wave in Boston has reached critical levels, with a CDD of 9.9 GG and no cooling relief in sight.
The humidity is relatively low at 33%, but the wind speed of 18.1 km/h is not enough to provide significant relief from the heat.
The city's residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe, as the heat wave is expected to continue for the next few days.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
